resources.string: Take a photo. Its SHA-256 hash will be signed by this device\'s hardware security chip and submitted to the Framechain API for nightly anchoring on the Solana blockchain.
Pick a photo from your gallery. The app will compute its SHA-256 hash and check whether it has been anchored to the Solana blockchain.
Get an email after each nightly batch is anchored to Solana. The email includes the hash count, Merkle root, and Solana transaction ID.
